title: Balloon Shape Colorful Helium Balloon Weights Balloon Weights Plastic Balloon Pack of 10 Weights for Balloons Birthday Wedding Party Decorations Supplies (Blue)
features: BALLOON WEIGHTS: You get what you see. Our balloon weights will look exactly the same colour as you see in the photos. Our photos are Original, taken by us and not copied from the internet. Our Unique combinations can shine up any party. These balloon weights will be a perfect fit for the kids' birthday party, Wedding, Gender Reveal, and New Year. The perfect combination of these balloon weights adds festival fun and creates a holiday atmosphere for an unforgettable time with family.

SIZE PACK AND COLOURS:- Size - Heavy Duty Star Shape Weights:- 7.7cm x 7.7cm weight 8g we have 12 colours to choose from: - Black, Blue, Gold, Green, Light Blue, Light Pink, Pink, Red, Rose Gold, Silver, White, Yellow. Available pack sizes - Pack of 5, 10, and 25.

HIGH QUALITY AND MATERIAL:- The balloon weight is made of durable plastic, suitable for balloons of 12 inches or less. More balloons or larger balloons require more balloon weights. These balloon weights are manufactured in the UK.

FYI:- These balloon weights are easy to use. It only needs a ribbon to tie and hold the balloon down to the floor. It's lightweight and it can be used by kids. It is practical and suitable for ordinary balloons, latex balloons, or helium balloons, which can be used repeatedly
QUICK TIP:- With these balloon weights, you don’t have to worry about the helium balloons floating away
description: Bring to your Party the perfect Balloon weights for decoration by Pannu Design. Our Balloon weights are ideal for Xmas, baby shower, birthday party, Christenings, theme party, 1st, 2nd, 3rd 4th, 5th, 6th, 7th 8th, 9th, 10th, 11th, 12th, 16th, 18th, 21st, 30th, 40th, 50th, 60th, 70th, 80th, 90th, 100th, Birthday party which will shine up your party and will make it a memorable day. Heavy Duty Balloon shape weight packages to choose from:- Size: 7.7cm x 7.7cm - weight 8g Packs of 10 colours: Black, Blue, Gold, Green, Light Blue, Light Pink, Pink, Red, Rose Gold, Silver, White, Yellow. Please note balloon weights are not supplied with ribbons. But you can still buy the ribbons separately from our shop on Amazon. PLEASE DON'T HESITATE TO CONTACT US FOR ANY QUERIES. Please let us know how you liked our balloons by leaving a review. Your opinion matters a lot and can help make us serve you better in the future.
